summary: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing, building, and scaling distributed systems and cloud-native applications. Proven track record of delivering high-impact features that improve performance and reliability for millions of users. Proficient in full-stack development with a focus on back-end architecture, API design, and DevOps practices. Passionate about clean code, developer experience, and mentoring engineering teams.

bullets.text: Architected and led the migration of a monolithic Ruby on Rails application to a microservices architecture using Node.js and Kubernetes, reducing deployment frequency from bi-weekly to multiple times per day.
Designed and implemented a real-time event streaming pipeline using Apache Kafka and AWS Lambda, processing over 50 million events per day with 99.99% uptime.
Reduced API response latency by 68% by introducing Redis caching layers and optimizing PostgreSQL query plans across the core transaction service.
Mentored a team of 4 junior and mid-level engineers through bi-weekly 1:1s, code reviews, and internal tech talks, contributing to 2 team promotions.
Championed and implemented a company-wide shift to trunk-based development with feature flags, eliminating long-lived feature branches and reducing merge conflicts by 90%.
Built and maintained RESTful and GraphQL APIs consumed by 3 internal teams and 2 external enterprise clients, serving 1.2 million active monthly users.
Developed an automated data reconciliation system in Python that replaced a 20-hour manual weekly process, saving the data team approximately 1,000 hours per year.
Improved CI/CD pipeline build times by 55% by parallelizing test suites in GitHub Actions and introducing Docker layer caching strategies.
Collaborated with the product and design teams to deliver a full-stack Next.js dashboard for enterprise clients, increasing user engagement metrics by 40%.
Authored internal developer documentation and runbooks that reduced on-call incident resolution time from an average of 45 minutes to under 15 minutes.
Developed core features for a SaaS B2B platform from 0 to 1, including user authentication (OAuth 2.0 / JWT), billing integrations (Stripe), and role-based access control.
Built responsive React front-end components and a Node.js/Express back-end, delivering the MVP that secured a $2M seed funding round.
Instrumented application monitoring and alerting using Datadog and PagerDuty, achieving observability across all critical services for the first time.

projects.name: OpenTrace – Distributed Tracing SDK
projects.description: Open-source lightweight distributed tracing SDK for Go microservices. Implements the OpenTelemetry specification with automatic context propagation. Garnered 850+ GitHub stars and adopted by 3 open-source projects.

projects.name: ResumeForge – AI Resume Tailoring Tool
projects.description: Full-stack SaaS application that uses LLM-based keyword extraction to help job seekers tailor their resumes to specific job descriptions. Processed 10,000+ resume exports in beta.

projects.name: PriceWatch – E-Commerce Price Tracker
projects.description: Web scraping and price alerting platform that monitors prices across 5 major retailers. Sends real-time alerts via email and SMS (Twilio). Supports 500+ concurrent user watchlists.

projects.name: CodePulse – Developer Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Personal productivity dashboard that aggregates GitHub contribution data and surfaces coding velocity trends, commit patterns, and code review turnaround times using interactive D3.js visualizations.
